# UnbondingPurse

Represents a pending unbonding (unstaking) request for a validator or delegator.

## Import

```ts
import { UnbondingPurse } from 'casper-js-sdk';
```

## Class

### `UnbondingPurse`

| Property | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `amount` | `CLValueUInt512` | Amount being unbonded (in motes) |
| `bondingPurse` | `URef` | The purse the stake is being returned to |
| `eraOfCreation` | `number` | Era in which the unbonding was requested |
| `unbonderPublicKey` | `PublicKey` | Public key of the entity unbonding |
| `validatorPublicKey` | `PublicKey` | Public key of the validator being unbonded from |
| `newValidator?` | `PublicKey` | New validator (only set during redelegation) |

## Usage

```ts
// UnbondingPurse appears in StoredValue.withdraw and StoredValue.unbonding
const result = await client.queryLatestGlobalState({
  key: 'account-hash-abc...',
  path: [],
});

if (result.storedValue.withdraw) {
  for (const purse of result.storedValue.withdraw) {
    console.log('Unbonding:', purse.amount.toString(), 'motes');
    console.log('From validator:', purse.validatorPublicKey.toHex());
    console.log('Era:', purse.eraOfCreation);

    if (purse.newValidator) {
      console.log('Redelegating to:', purse.newValidator.toHex());
    }
  }
}
```

## See Also

- [`StoredValue`](/types/stored-value) - Contains `withdraw` and `unbonding` fields
- [`Bid`](/types/bid) - Active staking bids
- [`NativeUndelegateBuilder`](/builders/NativeUndelegateBuilder) - Create an unbonding transaction
- [`NativeRedelegateBuilder`](/builders/NativeRedelegateBuilder) - Create a redelegation transaction
